# Final Review Proposal

## Summary

No actionable correctness, safety, or robustness findings in the scoped source/test changes. Reviewed the branch diff against c00d6ab9a69ccdb3c366419d56cb013ec29f7435 while ignoring .ralph-burning runtime state, and verified nix build, cargo fmt --check, clippy with test-stub, and targeted auto-materialization tests.

## Amendments

None.
